aries.horoscope_text: Your sensual side is likely to show itself today, Aries. You might find yourself viewing young folks in tight jeans more appreciatively than you usually do. Racy novels and movies might also suddenly seem appealing. Romantic encounters are intense and passionate, so make sure you allow plenty of time for them. Enjoy yourself!
aries.deploy_today: No — Your focus today is not code review, if you know what we mean.
aries.prophecy: The stars promise a passionate day. Your git commit history will not reflect that energy.

taurus.horoscope_text: Ingenious techniques for growing your money could come your way today, Taurus. While you aren't one to jump into anything, you're certainly likely to give these ideas serious thought. Take care to only go for those that are totally up front, with no hidden sides. Your passion for delving into new professional fields is only surpassed by your romantic passions. Plan a seductive evening with a partner. Make it a night to remember!
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — A new idea for cutting costs shows up. Make sure it's not just crypto with extra steps.
taurus.prophecy: Ingenious money-making schemes come your way today. It's crypto. It's always crypto.

gemini.horoscope_text: Today you're likely to be in just the right place at the right time to meet the right person. You're overdue for a lucky break and probably not expecting it. You may start the day in a restless and frustrated state of mind, Gemini, but whatever happens will catapult you out of it. Be prepared - this transition may involve vast changes in your life, in the long run if not immediately.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — The day starts rocky. So did your last three builds. This one might actually pass.
gemini.prophecy: A lucky break is coming, Gemini. It's a Stack Overflow answer from 2011 that finally makes sense.

cancer.horoscope_text: You might wake up this morning, look in the mirror, and decide that you hate what you see even though you probably look fine. This is a good day to shop for new clothes or get a haircut. Perhaps you feel a little blue. Getting out and indulging yourself is more a necessity than luxury. Don't overindulge in food or drink now, Cancer. You might not like the consequences tomorrow!
cancer.deploy_today: No — Self-doubt day. Not the day to touch prod, or your reflection.
cancer.prophecy: You'll feel a little blue today. So will your terminal, after that failed deploy.

leo.horoscope_text: Today you could find yourself seeking self-knowledge through relationships, Leo, especially through assisting those you love. Someone is troubled and needs your help. It would be best for all if you gave it, because you're especially sensitive and insightful now. You're especially able to soothe others' anger and mediate arguments. Your optimism is very high, and you have what it takes to pass it on to others.
leo.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll be mediating a conflict today. Mostly the one in the PR comments about tabs vs. spaces.
leo.prophecy: Your optimism will soothe arguments today. Mostly the one about tabs vs. spaces.

virgo.horoscope_text: Do you have a romantic evening planned for tonight, Virgo? If so, it's likely to turn out to be all you'd hoped for. You'll be especially attractive, and your naturally warm and loving nature will be very apparent. Even casual encounters with friends may bring about closer bonding, and new acquaintances are likely to become friends. Your communicative skills are good now, and people will likely respond to you. Go for it!
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — Your charm extends to your commit messages today. Rare. Enjoy it.
virgo.prophecy: Your communication skills shine today. Your Slack message will still get read three days late.

libra.horoscope_text: You could feel restless and anxious to get out in the open for a while today, Libra, but mundane tasks could force you to postpone it. Someone you care about might ask for a favor, and while you may not want to help this person, you probably will. Don't let your irritation show - just get it done quickly and accept the person's thanks. In the evening, go for a long walk under the stars.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Mundane tasks first. That 'quick favor' Slack DM does not count as a break.
libra.prophecy: You want freedom today. You'll get a 'quick favor' request instead. It is never quick.

scorpio.horoscope_text: At some point during the day you might find yourself involved in a project that piques your interest far more than usual. Be cautious about becoming overly absorbed, as this could divert attention from essential tasks. Your intuitive abilities and sharp wisdom are particularly strong on this day, and it's recommended you spend your evening in meditation to center yourself.
scorpio.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll go down a rabbit hole today. Just make sure it's not the one in prod.
scorpio.prophecy: A fascinating side project will grab you today. It is not the ticket you were assigned.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: Sagittarius, are you hoping to accomplish a goal that you've been working toward for a long time? Don't let delays cause you to fear that it will never happen. It could block your creative energy and cause you to lose faith in yourself. Fortunate changes are in the wind, but it's still going to take a little more effort to get where you want to be. Keep going. You'll get there!
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — It's not done, but progress is progress. Ship the partial and update the ticket.
sagittarius.prophecy: Keep going, the stars say — your goal is achievable. Your goal was the sprint deadline from three sprints ago.

capricorn.horoscope_text: You may be in an especially nurturing mood today, Capricorn. You might reach out to every living thing around you, from plants to pets to friends, children, and romantic partners. Just be careful that your helpfulness doesn't feel smothering to those you love. Focus some of that giving energy on yourself instead — a massage or a little personal indulgence wouldn't hurt.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — You'll be too busy reviewing everyone else's PRs to ship your own.
capricorn.prophecy: Your nurturing energy is high today. You'll review 14 PRs. Yours will still be sitting in draft.

aquarius.horoscope_text: Social responsibilities might appear to be hitting you all at once. Everyone you know seems to crave your company. As a naturally polite and socially astute person, you might feel obligated to accept any and all invitations. This isn't a good day to commit yourself. Wait a while until you're feeling a little more balanced, then send out your responses. Commit only to those events you would genuinely enjoy.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — Do not commit to anything today, especially not a merge you haven't tested.
aquarius.prophecy: Everyone wants a piece of your calendar today. So does your manager. Decline strategically.

pisces.horoscope_text: Important communications regarding finances could come today, Pisces, and it might be fortuitous if you follow up on them right away. Once that's done, you'll probably want to relax and delve into whatever interests you the most. It might be a good idea to read a book, since your mind is especially sharp. Take breaks in the fresh air. Ideas and insights should come quickly, so take notes.
pisces.deploy_today: Yes — Important financial comms today means check your AWS billing alert immediately.
pisces.prophecy: Insights will come quickly today, Pisces. So will the AWS bill notification you've been avoiding.
